meta.title: America's M1 Abrams tanks have arrived in Ukraine
meta.description:
According to multiple sources, an undisclosed number of American M1 Abrams main battle tanks have now arrived in Ukraine, giving the embattled nation a boost in armored capability amid its ongoing counter-offensive. 

Here's everything you need to know. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews
